cmd: out=$(jq -r '[(.grill.enabled // false), (.grill.deep // false)] | join(" ")' .agentic/config.json 2>/dev/null || echo "false false"); [ "$out" = "false false" ] && echo '{"parsed":"'"$out"'"}'
_note: missing config file must fall back to 'false false' (everything off) without erroring — the || fallback in the prescribed command
